basics.name: Rich
basics.title: AI Product Manager
basics.summary: 4 years of PM experience, leading multiple 0-1 AI products. Full-lifecycle capabilities. Dedicated to bridging the gap between LLM potential and business reality.

philosophy.title: Data-Driven Decision
philosophy.desc: In the AI era, data is fuel. I rely on quantitative analysis to ensure every feature has a clear path for growth.

philosophy.title: AI Empowered UX
philosophy.desc: Focusing on seamless LLM integration into workflows rather than brute-force tech stacking.

philosophy.title: Human-Centric Vision
philosophy.desc: The warmth under the tech shell comes from delicate human insights. I pursue humanized feedback in efficiency tools.

experience.summary: Overall planning and landing of new AI products, managing the full lifecycle.
highlights: Led core project: Localized Agent Development Platform.
Strategic partnership with AMD, exhibited at 2025 CIIE.
Assisted in completing Series A funding through successful MVP validation.

experience.summary: Core software planning, refactoring, and systemic upgrade of Architecture and R&D processes.
highlights: Led LED Display Control System refactor.

education.courses: Requirements Analysis, Data Structures, JAVA, etc. Graduation: 'Palm Classroom' Mobile App.

details.background: Planning next-gen localized AI agent dev platform.
details.work: Product architecture design and MVP Roadmap.
details.results: MVP delivered, Series A funding secured.
